root_text.an4.81:1.1: “Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an4.81:1.3: Pāṇātipātī hoti, adinnādāyī hoti, kāmesumicchācārī hoti, musāvādī hoti—
root_text.an4.81:1.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an4.81:2.1: Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an4.81:2.3: Pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti, adinnādānā paṭivirato hoti, kāmesumicchācārā paṭivirato hoti, musāvādā paṭivirato hoti—
root_text.an4.81:2.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an4.81:1.1: “Mendicants, someone with four qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.81:1.3: They kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, and lie.
translation_text.an4.81:1.4: Someone with these four qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.81:2.1: Someone with four qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.81:2.3: They don’t kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, or lie.
translation_text.an4.81:2.4: Someone with these four qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
